reply_original: Hi there! Thank you so much for the 5-star rating! We are thrilled to have you in the Fantasia community. If you ever have any ideas or need help, feel free to reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. Have a magical time chatting with your favorite characters!
reply_zh: 你好！非常感谢你的五星好评！我们很高兴你能加入 Fantasia 社区。如果你有任何想法或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝你与心仪的角色聊得愉快，度过一段奇妙的时光！
